# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "2.1"

services:
  - name: service-a
    url: http://service-a.example.com
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          hour: 1000

  - name: service-b
    url: http://service-b.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/b
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500

upstreams:
  - name: upstream-a
    targets:
      - target: 192.168.1.1:8000
        weight: 3

  - name: upstream-b
    targets:
      - target: 192.168.1.2:8000
        weight: 2

routes:
  - name: route-a
    paths:
      - /api/a
    services:
      - name: service-a
    plugins:
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add_headers:
            X-Service-A: "true"

  - name: route-b
    hosts:
      - example.com
    services:
      - name: service-b
